scene_input.scene_summary: ʿ Utbah advises his people to leave the Prophet alone
scene_input.key_visual_action: ʿ Utbah standing in front of his people, holding his hands up in a calming gesture
scene_input.setting: Desert gathering with a makeshift tent

schema_output.scene_summary: ʿ Utbah advises his people to leave the Prophet alone
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 71
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of respecting and leaving the Prophet and his message in peace

characters.name: ʿ Utbah ibn Rabīʿ ah
characters.appearance: tall, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep blue woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: ʿ Utbah's people
characters.appearance: diverse group of men in simple white thobes and brown woolen cloaks

schema_output.narrative_text: ʿ Utbah stood before his people, holding his hands up in a calming gesture, advising them to leave the Prophet alone.

compliance.notes: Historically accurate depiction of 7th century Arabian Desert gathering

schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A desert gathering scene with a makeshift tent in the background, its brown leather cover flapping gently in the wind. Late afternoon sunlight casts long shadows across the sandy ground. A group of men in simple white thobes and brown woolen cloaks stand before a tall figure seen from behind: dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep blue woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades. The central figure's hands are extended in a gentle reassuring gesture, while the men around him look on with a mix of curiosity and apprehension. Soft warm golden light, vast and open mood. Medium shot from slightly above, capturing the drama of the scene. Earthy tones with deep blue cloak as a color anchor. A small cluster of palm trees in the distance adds a sense of depth and context. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
_safety_changes: 'tall figure seen entirely from behind' -> 'tall figure seen from behind'
